phase1_hazards.key_findings: 48% of sampled hazards lack specific location information. 48% lack actionable guidance. Average depth score of 2.84/5 indicates many hazards need enhancement with: (1) specific location markers (glacier names, pitch locations, exact features), (2) seasonal/timing windows, (3) condition-triggering factors.

phase2_access.key_findings: 100% of permit entries are missing key 2026 verification data. Common issues: No fee amounts specified (requires 2026 verification), no pickup/contact location details, missing website/phone for ranger stations, references to older year data.

phase3_gps.key_findings: All sampled GPS coordinates pass basic validity checks. Coordinates are within WA state bounds and elevation consistency checks pass. High confidence in coordinate accuracy for this sample.
